name: Favorite Crock Pot Chili
recipeIngredient: 2 (16 oz.) cans red kidney beans drained
1 green pepper, seeded and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the chuck in a large, preferably non-stick saucepan and drain off the fat.
2. Add the ground beef and remaining ingredients to a 3 1/2 to 4 quart crock pot. If using a small crock pot, halve the recipe.
3. Stir well, cover, and cook on low for 10-12 hours.
4. Makes 12 cups of chili.
